heading: Tuesday Night
text: Partly cloudy, except mostly cloudy early in southeastern Vermont and southern New Hampshire. Patchy valley fog late. Lows in the mid to upper 50s, with some lower 50s in the cooler hollows north, and around 60 in the Champlain Valley. Northwest winds 5 to 10 mph early, then diminishing to light and variable.

heading: Wednesday
text: Patchy valley fog early, then mostly to partly sunny. Chance of an afternoon shower northeast, and near the Vermont/Québec border. Highs in the mid to upper 70s, around 80 in the Champlain, Connecticut, and Hudson valleys, and some lower 70s northeast. Northwest winds 5 to 10 mph.

heading: Wednesday Night
text: Chance of an evening shower far north, then clearing; clouds then redeveloping after midnight, from the Adirondacks and Route 2 northward. Lows in the low to mid 50s, except mid 50s to around 60 in the Champlain and St. Lawrence valleys. Light and variable winds.
